top3.sql:
WITH session_pages AS (
  SELECT 
    session,
    path AS page,
    stamp,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp ASC) AS rn_asc,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp DESC) AS rn_desc
  FROM activity_log
  WHERE path IS NOT NULL
),
landing_exit_pages AS (
  SELECT session, page
  FROM session_pages
  WHERE rn_asc = 1 OR rn_desc = 1
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) AS total_unique_sessions
FROM landing_exit_pages;

landing_pages AS (
    SELECT session, page
    FROM session_pages
    WHERE rn_asc = 1
),
exit_pages AS (
    SELECT session, page
    FROM session_pages
    WHERE rn_desc = 1

WITH session_pages AS (
  SELECT 
    session,
    path AS page,
    stamp,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp ASC) AS rn_asc,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp DESC) AS rn_desc
  FROM activity_log
  WHERE path IS NOT NULL
),
landing_exit_pages AS (
  SELECT session, page
  FROM session_pages
  WHERE rn_asc = 1 OR rn_desc = 1
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) AS total_unique_sessions
FROM landing_exit_pages;
